problem: Why do traumatic memories become locked and intrusive — what neural mechanism?
hypothesis: If BDNF upregulation to promote neurogenesis is applied to what, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Longitudinal patient cohort with 25 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
